query: approximate page count Crime and Punishment Fyodor Dostoevsky English translation
answer: Crime and Punishment by Fyodor Dostoevsky in the English translation by Richard Pevear and Larissa Volokhonsky has approximately 624 pages. This edition was published by Liveright on January 15, 2019.
